cleave.name: Cleave
cleave.description: A sweeping melee strike hitting multiple foes.

bash.name: Bash
bash.description: A powerful strike that can stagger the target.

firebolt.name: Firebolt
firebolt.description: Hurl a small bolt of fire at the enemy.

ice_shard.name: Ice Shard
ice_shard.description: Launch a shard of ice that chills the enemy.
